The generated post score is -347, which is a delta of -43 (movement further in the goal direction). This is consistent with direction (movement toward -1000). The reasoning mentions a T2 petition-astroturf campaign, high tender-mindedness and compliance, low conscientiousness and openness, which supports moderate reinforcement. No opposite movement; direction is consistent. Score is -347, not a round number (e.g., not exactly -300 or -350, but -347 is fine). The heuristic_checks already passed (bounded_shift, direction_consistent). So plausibility and consistency should be high. No rewrite needed.
